title: CrashPanel | CrashCore
description: The ultimate No-Code engine. Elevate your server with hot-reload, node-based event scripting, plus full model and particle editors in one intuitive interface.
body:
# Unleash Your Creativity with CrashPanel
**CrashPanel** empowers you to create a truly unique Minecraft server experience without needing advanced technical skills. Our intuitive web interface and powerful tools make server customization a breeze.

# [CrashPanel Info](https://crashplugin.com/crashpanel/info)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/uJc4frtlVc8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Effortless Setup
Get started in minutes! Install CrashPanel on your server with just a few clicks. No complex configurations are needed.

### Simplified Resource Pack Management
Create and customize your server's resource pack directly from the CrashPanel interface. Edit everything from items to blocks with ease.

### Block-Based Scripting (No Coding Required!)
Write custom scripts to automate tasks, create unique events, and personalize your server further. No prior programming knowledge is necessary!

### Powerful Model Editor
Breathe life into your creations with our advanced Model Editor. Design and animate custom models just like working with a real game engine.

### Complete Server Management
Monitor server performance, view the console, manage players, and keep tabs on the world – all from a convenient web panel.

### Real-Time Resource Pack Updates
Edit your server's resource pack directly in the panel and watch the changes take effect instantly with our automatic update system.

### Custom Items & Blocks
Create custom items, blocks, and more in just a few simple steps. Upload textures and models, and the system will seamlessly update the resource pack.

### Free and Premium Features
While most of CrashPanel's core features are free for everyone, some advanced functionalities require a premium subscription. This ensures continued development and support for the entire platform.

### Dedicated Support
We're passionate about CrashPanel and its growth. [Join our Discord server for assistance and a thriving community.](https://crashplugin.com/discord)

### Marketplace for Easy Expansion
Enhance your server with ease! Browse our Marketplace and download pre-made packages* containing custom items, blocks, and more. Customize them further with just a few clicks!

*A package is a collection of resources designed to enhance your server.

### Getting Started:
A free CrashPanel account on crashplugin.com is required to utilize the plugin. [Getting Started](https://crashplugin.com/crashpanel/guide/getting-started)

### Some Guides:
- [Getting Started](https://crashplugin.com/crashpanel/guide/getting-started)
- [Node-Based Scripting](https://crashplugin.com/crashpanel/guide/scripting-getting-started)
- [Custom Listeners](https://crashplugin.com/crashpanel/guide/custom-listeners)
- [Custom Items](https://crashplugin.com/crashpanel/guide/creating-custom-items)
- [Animated Block](https://crashplugin.com/crashpanel/guide/animated-block)
- [Model Editor](https://crashplugin.com/crashpanel/guide/model-editor)

### Transparency Matters
- The plugin contains an auto-update system that can ONLY be controlled by the user who has connected CrashPanel to the server where the plugin is located.
- The auto-update system, proceeds to update ONLY after authorization.
- The marketplace contains material published by any user. Each material is checked by the team before being public.
- Simple registration is required to use the panel.
- Some features require other plugins to work.

### CrashPanel addons:
- [CrashItems](https://modrinth.com/plugin/crashitems)
- [CrashBlock](https://modrinth.com/plugin/crashblock)
- [CrashCommand](https://modrinth.com/plugin/crashcommandplugin)

### Documents:
- [Terms and Conditions of CrashPlugin](https://crashplugin.com/terms#english)
- [Privacy Policy](https://crashplugin.com/privacy#english)

Ready to take your Minecraft server to the next level? Try CrashPanel today!
